creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
Jarrod Sayers wrote:
> I'm not sure I see the issue here?  Can you elaborate?
> 
> The plugin check_ssh is used to check the availability of an SSH service 
> and check_by_ssh is used in a way similar to NRPE in that it calls a 
> process on a remote server via SSH.  In addition to this, 
> libexec/nagios/check_ssh is currently listed in the ports pkg-plist file 
> (line 56).
> 
> Jarrod.
> (net-mgmt/nagios-plugins maintainer)

See attached tinderbox log where PLIST is broken.

Also here until something recompiles this port.
http://tinderbox-i386.p6m7g8.net/tb/errors/8.0-FreeBSD/nagios-plugins-1.4.11_1,1.log
